description: Stage scene geometry -- the default geometry. Large backdrop plane at z=-30, floor plane angled down from camera (rotation [-PI/2,0,0]), subject plane at z=-5. Classic 'subject in front of a background' setup with real perspective on the floor. Defines 6 slots (3 required: backdrop, floor, subject; 3 optional: sky, midground, near_fg), compatible cameras, default camera (slow_push_forward), and fog settings per Section 4.2. Addresses TC-01 (five planes sufficient).
notes: Tier 2 geometry. The simplest, most fundamental geometry -- used as the basis for SKILL.md examples. Spec approved after 4-round deliberation. Constructs PlaneSlot objects (OBJ-005 type), not DepthSlot (OBJ-007 type). All optional PlaneSlot fields explicitly set.
